name: rutin
summary: Flavonol glycoside commonly reported from buckwheat and St.
description: Flavonol glycoside commonly reported from buckwheat and St. John's wort with inflammatory pathway activity.
safetyNotes: generally safe; mild GI discomfort in some individuals; generally well tolerated; mild gastrointestinal discomfort possible | Mostly food/extract-derived human evidence. High-dose supplements may affect CYP/transporters or anticoagulant/antiplatelet risk.
